Requirement Description: Ensure data is processed lawfully, fairly, and transparently.
Users must be able to access, modify, or delete their data upon request.
Obtain explicit, informed consent before processing personal data.
Notify supervisory authority of data breaches within 72 hours.
Appoint a Data Protection Officer for monitoring compliance.
Provide a clear opt-out mechanism for the sale of personal data.

Compliance Area: CCPA - User Access and Deletion Requests
Requirement Description: Allow users to request access to or deletion of their data.
Ensure no discrimination against users for exercising their CCPA rights.
Ensure a secure network infrastructure and firewall protection.
Protect stored cardholder data using encryption and secure storage.
Maintain systems for protection against malware and vulnerabilities.

Compliance Area: PCI-DSS - Implement Strong Access Control Measures
Requirement Description: Limit access to cardholder data to authorized personnel only.

Compliance Area: PCI-DSS - Regularly Monitor and Test Networks
Requirement Description: Implement systems to regularly test security measures and procedures.
Maintain an updated information security policy for all personnel.
